taxonomy: Chiloschista fasciata is a species of orchid, belonging to the genus Chiloschista. This genus is part of the subtribe Chiloschiinae, within the family Orchidaceae. The Orchidaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse plant families, comprising over 30,000 known species. Chiloschista fasciata is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries such as Thailand and Malaysia.
